text: "Green background with sunburst effect."
original_texts: A green background with radiating lines appears, creating a sunburst effect.

text: Happy Learning
A smiling blue cloud floats in from the left, moving toward the center.
original_text: A blue cloud with a smiling face enters from the left side of the screen and floats towards the center.

text: VIEW IN SPANISH
Earth spins in space as sunlight illuminates it. The moon drifts closer, sliding between Earth and sun—casting a partial eclipse.
The Earth and moon align, casting the moon’s shadow on Earth. The sun is fully covered—its corona and stars glow in the dark sky.
A full moon glows against a starry sky. The moon's edge darkens, signaling the start of a lunar eclipse.
A bright sun shines on the left, casting rays across space. Earth sits to the right; the moon drifts into its shadow. Yellow lines appear, showing sunlight blocked—causing the moon to darken.
A rocket stands on the launch pad at night, lit by floodlights. Behind it, a red moon rises—growing larger, brighter, and casting an orange glow across the dark sky.
Nighttime cityscape glowing with lights, under a rising moon.
A fully reddened moon during a total lunar eclipse, alongside a partially eclipsed moon.
The moon, partially darkened, moves across the screen, gradually revealing more light.
original_text: A partial lunar eclipse is shown, with the moon partially darkened as if a bite has been taken out of it. The moon slowly moves across the screen, revealing more of its illuminated surface.

text: A full moon glows above dark pines. Its left side fades. The reddish moon hangs in the sky, framed by silhouettes, casting a serene, mysterious mood.
A young boy in a red shirt peers through a blue telescope on a tripod in a starry, dark blue sky, with a partially eclipsed moon in the upper right and green trees and mountains behind him.
original_text: A young boy with brown hair and a red shirt is looking through a blue telescope set up on a tripod in a grassy field at night. The sky is dark blue, dotted with stars, and there are green trees and mountains in the background. A partially eclipsed moon is visible in the upper right corner of the scene.

text: The moon shifts from dark to fully lit, revealing its craters and surface details.
original_text: The moon gradually transitions from a darkened state to being fully illuminated, showcasing its craters and surface details as it moves through the phases.

text: The Sun on the left. The Moon moves between Earth and Sun, setting up a solar eclipse. Sunlight bends around the Moon, casting a shadow on Earth.
A bright sun, partly hidden by Earth, shines against a blue sky with radiating lines.
SOLAR ECLIPSE
The scene shows a solar eclipse surrounded by a collage of animals, scientific tools, and historical figures.
original_text: The scene transitions to a collage of various images including animals, scientific equipment, and historical figures surrounding an animated depiction of a solar eclipse.

text: www.HappyLearning.TV
A blue cloud with a smiling face hovers over a collage of educational images, including a leaping dolphin, a crocodile's face, and a historical figure in uniform.
original_text: A collage of various educational images appears, including a dolphin leaping from the water, a crocodile's close-up face, and a historical figure in uniform. A blue cloud with a smiling face is prominently displayed over these images.

text: A large, smiling blue cloud appears on a white background, with the colorful website URL below it.
original_text: The scene transitions to a white background featuring a large blue cloud with a smiling face. Below it, the website URL 'www.HappyLearning.TV' is shown in colorful letters.
